title: Aurora Basin Event
text: The Aurora Basin microseism event was recorded on March 14, 2024. The first confirmed detection came from Larkspur Ridge Observatory at 03:17 local time.

title: Larkspur Ridge Observatory
text: Larkspur Ridge Observatory is a mountain monitoring facility operated by the Northbridge Institute of Seismology. Its instruments track small ground-motion events across the northern basin.

title: Northbridge Institute of Seismology
text: The Northbridge Institute of Seismology is a research organization focused on regional seismic monitoring, instrument calibration, and public hazard reports.

title: Solace Archive
text: The Solace Archive is a public records collection located in the Meridian District. Its reading room preserves maps, ferry ledgers, and civic design files.

title: Meridian District Ferry Route
text: Route M-12 links the Meridian District with Old Quay. The route is served by the Blue Horizon ferry during weekday morning and evening crossings.

title: Blue Horizon Ferry
text: The Blue Horizon ferry uses modular sodium-ion battery banks for propulsion. The city selected that chemistry to reduce dependence on scarce nickel supplies.

title: Old Quay
text: Old Quay is a waterfront neighborhood east of the harbor locks. It is known for restored warehouses and a compact ferry terminal used by Route M-12.

title: Civic Design Prize
text: The 2025 Civic Design Prize was awarded to architect Iris Chen for her work on resilient public structures and low-energy community shelters.

title: Iris Chen
text: Iris Chen designed the Tideglass Habitat, a coastal research shelter built for long-duration field teams. The project emphasized passive cooling and modular repair.

title: Tideglass Habitat
text: The Tideglass Habitat uses silica aerogel insulation panels in its exterior shell. The material helps the shelter maintain stable indoor temperatures with minimal power.
